purpose: Sweep up newly proposed hooks (narrative, scene, factual, taxonomy), remove duplicates, cluster related ideas, and triage what should advance now, later, or never.
outcome: A prioritized, tagged hook set ready for Lore Deepening (canonization) and follow-on loops, with risks and dependencies made explicit.

steps.name: Open Hook Harvest TU
steps.description: Open TU and broadcast to consulted roles

steps.name: Collect
steps.description: Sweep all new 'proposed' hooks; reject obvious dupes; link provenance

steps.name: Cluster
steps.description: Group by theme (e.g., 'Wormhole economy', 'Kestrel arc'), then by type (narrative|scene|factual|taxonomy)

steps.name: Annotate
steps.description: Add or confirm triage tags, uncertainty levels, dependencies for each hook

steps.name: Decide
steps.description: Mark each as accepted, deferred, or rejected (with 1-line reason)

steps.name: Package
steps.description: Produce Harvest Sheet summarizing decisions for hand-off

inputs: Hook cards in Hot SoT with status 'proposed'
Recent topology notes, section drafts, style addenda
Open QA notes from Gatekeeper (integrity/reachability/nonlinearity risks)

contents: Cluster headings with lists of hooks (accepted/deferred/rejected)
Risk notes (dormant Researcher? style pressure? topology churn?)
Activation requests (roles Showrunner should wake for next loops)
